expectations.text: Shows NPS for both WhatsApp and CleverTap per sprint
expectations.evidence: NPS shown for both channels across RSP1, RSP2, RSP3: WhatsApp (-8.5, -17.1, -17.8), CleverTap (5.6, 7.2, -0.8)

expectations.text: Includes CIs and sample sizes for each channel-sprint combination
expectations.evidence: All 6 channel-sprint combinations include CI ranges and sample sizes (e.g., WhatsApp RSP1: CI [-17.0, -0.0] n=484)

expectations.text: States which channel performs better with evidence
expectations.evidence: Executive summary: 'CleverTap consistently outperforms WhatsApp across all three sprints' with per-sprint differences and p-values

expectations.text: Runs significance test on the channel difference
expectations.evidence: P-values for each sprint comparison: RSP1 p=0.050 (not sig), RSP2 p=0.001 (sig), RSP3 p=0.010 (sig)

notes: Excellent output. Includes cross-sprint trend analysis showing WhatsApp declining and CleverTap stable-to-declining. Summary table is clean. Data quality notes appropriate.
